{{Quote|You look worried. And angry. Didn't I suggest that you relax? You'd think you'd just gotten a reprimand from Rei Soffran.|Granta Omega, to Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="TST" />}}
'''Rei Soffran''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Soffran served as a [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and taught the intermediate level students. He was a revered teacher and his lectures were considered to be tough by his pupils. Students would be alarmed when summoned to Soffran's chamber, as the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master would use his abilities to isolate a student's faults and pinpoint their origins and their connections to other actions.<ref name="TST" />

In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and [[Force void/Legends|Force Blank]] [[Granta Omega]] mentioned Soffran while trying to surprise [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] with insider information about the Jedi Order, from which he [[Mission to Mawan|attempted to seduce]] Skywalker to defect and join with him.<ref name="TST" />

==Behind the scenes==
Soffran was first mentioned in [[2003]] novel ''[[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap]]'' written by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="TST" />
